publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-12-24 18:12:44 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, clippings, articles, photographs, reports, brochures, syllabi, notes, teaching materials, diary notes, reviews, speeches, bulletins, memoranda.
did.abstract: Personal and professional papers and biographical information about Professor Stycos, sociologist, photographer and professor of sociology.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Joseph Mayone Stycos received a B.A. from Princeton University and a Ph.D. from Columbia University. After serving as one of the first Population Council Fellows (1954-55), he came to Cornell in 1957. In 1962, he founded the International Population Program, which he directed until 1992. He also served as Professor of Sociology, and chair of the Department of Sociology and Anthropology (1966-1970), as director of the Latin American Studies Program (1962-1966) and as Professor of Rural Sociology (1988- ). He has authored numerous books and articles on population issues including birth control, fertility, socio-psychological dimensions in husband-wife relations, adolescence, survey research, and population and the environment. Most of his work focused on Latin America, but he also gave attention to Egypt, India, China, Poland, Turkey, and the U.S. Throughout his career, he was an avid photographer, and illustrated a number of his books with photographs taken during the course of his research, including a book of photographs, entitled Children of the Barriada and one entitled Margin of Life, on which he collaborated with Cornell Capa.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Stycos photograph collection includes photos from around the world on a wide range of subjects, plants, people buildings. Includes photographs of China, focusing on images relating to population control programs, taken in 1989. Many photos of Central America, India, Europe, and Upstate New York. Includes photographs of China, focusing on images relating to population control programs, taken in 1989. Also, biographical information about Professor Stycos, correspondence, articles, annual reports, department files, and course material.

emph.ref: Series II. Correspondence, Publications, Subject Files, and Speeches

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: J. Mayone Stycos papers, #21-33-3171. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Items in Boxes 1-9 are framed.

Family planning worker with pie charts
Posing in front of lotus flower
Little boys near the Summer Palace

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Various publications, about, authored by, or featuring Stycos photographs. Includes several publications about Latin America.

did.unittitle: Publications from the exhibition of Stycos photos
Additional indices to Stycos photograph albums

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also includes some Photoshopped photos and pictures from Storm King N.Y..

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mixed photos, matted 11x13, various locations.

did.unittitle: Signs of Latin America photo box

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Various sizes, matted and loose.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photo of Stycos

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 11 x 14 prints, many featuring plants.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Box says black and white seconds and Central American Faces, but contains color and black and white items of various subjects.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Index at front. 11 x 14, black and white, largely from the 1970s. Locations include: Lansing N.Y., Brighton England, Twin Glens woods Ithaca, Peru, Port of Spain Trinidad, Digby Nova Scotia, Brazil, Mexico City, Senegal, others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Index at front. 11 x 14, black and white. Locations include: Twin Glens Ithaca, pipes, JFK airport, Treman Park, Buenos Aires, New Paltz, Saugerties, Geneva N.Y., Bogota Columbia, Tegucigalpa, Digby Nova Scotia, others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Index at front. 11 x 14, black and white. Locations include: Copper canyon, Eiffel Tower Paris France, Lehigh Valley train, Central New York, England, Dunedin Florida, Digby Nova Scotia, Freeville N.Y., Aruba, Cornell Plantations, Mexico, Buenos Aires, others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Index at front. 11 x 14, color. Locations include: Peru, Havana Cuba, River Po, Guatemala, Twin Glens Ithaca, Sapsucker Woods, Danube River Austria, Merida Mexico, Florida, Cornell, Tappan Zee Bridge New York, Aurora, and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Index at front. 11 x 14, color. Locations include: Washington D.C., Spain, Malta, Oxaca Mexico, Merida, Mexico City, Twin Glens Ithaca, Cayuga Lake, Cuba, Danube River Austria, others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Index at front. 11 x 14, mainly black and white, some color. Locations include: Warsaw Poland, Venice Italy, Tompkins County, Costa Rica, Maryland, Buenos Aires Argentina, Geneva Switzerland,Twin Glens Ithaca, Ottawa Canada, Florida, Cornell Plantations, Libe Slope Cornell, Lansing New York,, Digby Canada, Peru, England, others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Index at front. 11 x 14, color. Locations include: Twin Glens Ithaca, Merida Mexico, Malta, Provence France, Copper canyon, Lake Titicaca, Rome Italy, Havana Cuba, Sapsucker Woods, Poland, London England, others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Index at front. 13 x 19, color. Locations include: Sapsucker Woods, Copper Canyon, Cornell Plantations, Danube Austria, Upstate New York, Merida, New Tate Museum, Tompkins County, Lucerne Switzerland, Clifford, New York, Gore Island Senegal. Also a photo of Maria Stycos and one of Sid Vicious graffiti

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Index at front. 11 x 17, black and white and color. Locations include: New York State, Zocalo, Mexico City, Nature, Copper Canyon, Tompkins County, Cuba, Hotel Tequendama Columbia, Jamaica Inn Florida, Saugerties New York, and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Index at front. 11 x 14, black and white and color. Locations include: Honduras, Aurora, Syracuse, Freeville, Ithaca, New York, Mexico City, Digby Canada, Warsaw, El Salvador others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Index at front. 11 x 14, various. Album appears to have been disassembled as it is mostly empty.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 13 x 19 photos.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 13 x 19 or larger prints. Includes photo of Maria Stycos and son.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 13 x 19 or larger black and white prints.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 13 x 19 or larger color prints. Matted for exhibition or sale.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 18 x 20, mostly color. Many mounted to foam board for exhibition.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 18 x 20, black and white. Many mounted to foam board for exhibition. Includes exhibit text.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 11 x 14, various subjects.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 8 x 10, color. Index at front. Locations include: Geneva Switzerland, Cuba, Mexico, Warren Hall Cornell, Copper Canyon, Sapsucker Woods, others. Incldues photo of Stycos' shadow, also one of Maria Stycos and son, and a photo of planes from a plane.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 8 x 10, color photos of plants.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 8 x 10.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 8 x 10, various subjects.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 8 x 10, various subjects.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 8 x 10, various subjects, many experimental and Photoshopped photos.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Folder of material removed from a binder regarding exhibitions of Stycos photographs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photo box of correspondence, contact sheets, and negatives of Chinese photographs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 8 x 10, various subjects.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Small matted photos, mostly of manipulated or abstract imagery.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Small photos. Includes photo of Maria Stycos with father opera singer Marian Nowakowski in a car, also a photo J. Stycos grandfather, and a self portrait of Stycos and wife Maria.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Troy, N.Y. photos. Includes photos of cemeteries and of the Troy District Shirt Factory.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Many self portraits or photographs of Joseph and family

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Mexico, Paraguay, Latin America, Peru, Bolivia

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Nautre, plants and animal photos.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly photos of landscapes and nature.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes 1948 self-portrait that has been Photoshopped.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly 11 x 14, color, black and white, various subjects. Includes photo of Maria Stycos.

scopecontent.p: Medium format, 11 x 13, some used for exhibition at Kendal October 2016, plus Barrida material.

scopecontent.p: Including "Latin American Newspaper Coverage of Population & Family Planning", July 1967 - August 2968

did.unittitle: Birth Control Articles from Puerto Rico News

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes work from Princeton and others. Titles include: And Yet a Little While, Mud on the Wall, On Love, On Science and Religion, The Negro Problem Prejudice and Discrimination, Excerpts from a Novel to Be, and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: From a folder with the above title. Contains papers by Stycos including some done at Princeton. Titles include, Mysticism a Short Critique, A Psychologist Looks at Latins, And Yet A Little While, Howard,

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Typed notes possibly from sociology classes attended by Stycos at Princeton.

did.unittitle: Publications by Stycos from Columbia University

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes A Conceptual Analysis of Motivation In Men's clothing Behavior October 1949 and Changes in Razor Blade Brands A Study of Consumer Motivations April 1950

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter form the U.S. Ambassador to Haiti, Ernest Bonhomme, about doing research in Haiti. Also a publication titled The Survey Under Unusual Conditions, The Jamaica Human Fertility Investigation by Kurt W. Back and J. Mayone Stycos.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Articles, correspondence, and publications about Greece and Greeks. Includes paper titled Cyprus and the Greco-Turkish Conflict by Steven Stycos, Greek Immigration, Greeks of Ithaca,

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes stationary for Stycos Cleaners, various letters, and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Various publications, about, authored by, or featuring Stycos photographs. Includes several publications about Latin America.

did.unittitle: Transcripts from Princeton and Columbia University

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Three seven drawer filing cabinets in the mezzanine, Stimson foyer, contain clippings from various Latin American newspapers concerning population issues including the 1968 Encyclical Humanae Vitae. The clippings are filed by country and then chronologically
